title: TONGKTAI Dog Toys, Soft Stuffed Plush Balls Pet Chew Squeake Toy, Interactive Fetch Play for Small Medium Pets (8 pack)
features: Funny Squeak Toy: Each toy has a built-in squeaker which makes a cute squeaky sound when dogs bite or you squeeze it, easy to grab dogs’ attention and make playtime more exciting.
Interactive Fetch Balls: The round shaped balls can easily roll and bounce a bit off the ground, great for chasing to keep healthy and playing toss & fetch games to reduce boredom.

Soft Plush Toy: Made of premium plush and filled with stuffing, the toys are soft and won’t hurt puppy’s gums and teeth, safe and reliable for your pup to chew and play. Plush toys can be easily wash by hand or machine.
Gift for Small & Medium Pets: The colorful balls are 3” in diameter, which is about the size of a standard baseball, perfect for puppies, small & medium dogs. Cats like chasing the balls too.

Dog Toys Set with Smiley Face: 8 PCS toys with funny expressions to keep doggies entertained, no need to worry about toys lost under the couch. We provide refund or replacement within 30 days. Please feel free to contact us with any questions.
description: Product Description Our funny plush dog toy is an ideal choice for dog owner and their furry friend Safety is a top priority. The high-quality plush material is carefully selected and undergoes strict quality inspections. The stitching is strong and durable, ensuring that even during intense play, the sound device is securely enclosed within the ball, protecting your dog from any potential harm. It offers a rich variety of sensory stimulation. The bright and vivid colors of the 8pcs plush ball catch your dog's attention visually. Although dogs' vision is not as acute as humans', they are still sensitive to colors. The combination of the soft texture of the plush, the interesting sound it makes when squeezed, and the appealing visual appearance provides a multi-sensory experience that highly stimulates your dog's interest and makes playtime more enjoyable and engaging. It facilitates interaction. It's extremely convenient for dog owners to engage in interactive games with their pets. You can easily attract your dog's attention by squeezing the ball to make a sound and then tossing it for a fun game of fetch. Whether it's in the backyard or at the park, this toy helps strengthen the bond between you and your dog while also ensuring they get enough exercise. It helps relieve your dog's anxiety. When dogs are left alone, this soft plush toy can serve as a great companion. The sound it emits can distract them from feelings of loneliness and anxiety. when your dog chews or squeezes the toy to squeak, it can self-soothe and maintain emotional stability.
